meaning: adj.(悲哀的,可怜的)sad的最高级
examples: This is the saddest thing I've ever heard.
He would laugh the loudest over fun and be the saddest over anyone's misfortune.
She was singing the saddest lullaby he had ever heard.
The saddest aspect of this story is that Kingdoms of Amalur was not a bad game.
Saddest news of the day: Caribou Coffee announced it is closing all stores in Michigan.
